References
==========

This page collects the main dataset and model references cited throughout the
PyHazards docs. It is a project reference list, not an exhaustive bibliography.

Dataset References
------------------

- Gelaro, R., McCarty, W., Suárez, M. J., et al. (2017). *The Modern-Era Retrospective Analysis for Research and Applications, Version 2 (MERRA-2)*. `[link] <https://journals.ametsoc.org/view/journals/clim/30/14/jcli-d-16-0758.1.xml>`__.
- Hersbach, H., Bell, B., Berrisford, P., et al. (2020). *The ERA5 global reanalysis*. `[link] <https://rmets.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/qj.3803>`__.
- NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (NCEI). *Storm Events Database Documentation*. `[link] <https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/access/metadata/landing-page/bin/iso?id=gov.noaa.ncdc:C00648>`__.
- Schroeder, W., Oliva, P., Giglio, L., and Csiszar, I. (2014). *The New VIIRS 375 m active fire detection data product: Algorithm description and initial assessment*. `[link] <https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rse.2013.08.008>`__.
- Eidenshink, J., Schwind, B., Brewer, K., Zhu, Z., Quayle, B., and Howard, S. (2007). *A project for monitoring trends in burn severity*. `[link] <https://doi.org/10.4996/fireecology.0301003>`__.
- Rollins, M. G. (2009). *LANDFIRE: A nationally consistent vegetation, wildland fire, and fuel assessment*. `[link] <https://doi.org/10.1071/WF08088>`__.
- National Interagency Fire Center (NIFC). *Wildland Fire Incident Geospatial Services (WFIGS)*. `[link] <https://data-nifc.opendata.arcgis.com/>`__.
- Schmit, T. J., Griffith, P., Gunshor, M. M., et al. (2017). *A closer look at the ABI on the GOES-R series*. `[link] <https://doi.org/10.1175/BAMS-D-15-00230.1>`__.

Model References
----------------

- Shen et al. (2023). *Developing risk assessment framework for wildfire in the United States*. `[link] <https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2949926723000033>`__.
- Marjani et al. (2024). *Application of Explainable Artificial Intelligence in Predicting Wildfire Spread: An ASPP-Enabled CNN Approach*. `[link] <https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10568207>`__.
- Orion-AI-Lab. *wildfire_forecasting repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/Orion-AI-Lab/wildfire_forecasting>`__.
- Gerold et al. *WildfireSpreadTS repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/SebastianGer/WildfireSpreadTS>`__.
- bronteee. *ASUFM repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/bronteee/fire-asufm>`__.
- forefireAPI. *ForeFire repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/forefireAPI/forefire>`__.
- openwfm. *WRF-SFIRE repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/openwfm/WRF-SFIRE>`__.
- SeasFire. *FireCastNet repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/SeasFire/firecastnet>`__.
- Taghizadeh et al. (2025). *Interpretable physics-informed graph neural networks for flood forecasting*. `[link] <https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/mice.13484>`__.
- Lyu et al. (2025). *Rapid wavefield forecasting for earthquake early warning via deep sequence to sequence learning*. `[link] <https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-025-65435-2>`__.
- AI4EPS. *PhaseNet repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/AI4EPS/PhaseNet>`__.
- Mousavi et al. *EQTransformer repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/smousavi05/EQTransformer>`__.
- interseismic. *Generalized Phase Detection repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/interseismic/generalized-phase-detection>`__.
- AI4EPS. *EQNet repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/AI4EPS/EQNet>`__.
- SeisBench contributors. *SeisBench repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/seisbench/seisbench>`__.
- SeisBench contributors. *pick-benchmark repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/seisbench/pick-benchmark>`__.
- SCECCode. *pyCSEP repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/SCECCode/pycsep>`__.
- Chen. *AEFA repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/chenyk1990/aefa>`__.
- NeuralHydrology contributors. *NeuralHydrology repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/neuralhydrology/neuralhydrology>`__.
- HydroPML. *FloodCast repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/HydroPML/FloodCast>`__.
- HydroPML. *UrbanFloodCast repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/HydroPML/UrbanFloodCast>`__.
- Google Research. *flood-forecasting repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/google-research/flood-forecasting>`__.
- Kratzert et al. *Caravan repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/kratzert/Caravan>`__.
- UHI Lab. *WaterBench repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/uihilab/WaterBench>`__.
- HydroPML. *FloodCastBench repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/HydroPML/FloodCastBench>`__.
- EMscience. *HydroBench repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/EMscience/HydroBench>`__.
- Xu et al. *tropicalcyclone_MLP repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/wenweixu/tropicalcyclone_MLP>`__.
- Fu et al. *TropiCycloneNet repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/xiaochengfuhuo/TropiCycloneNet>`__.
- Xuguangning et al. *TI_Prediction / SAF-Net repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/xuguangning1218/TI_Prediction>`__.
- Wang et al. *TCIF-fusion repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/wangchong96/TCIF-fusion>`__.
- Gomez. *TCBench Alpha repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/msgomez06/TCBench_Alpha>`__.
- NOAA NCEI. *IBTrACS product page*. `[link] <https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/products/international-best-track-archive>`__.
- DeepMind. *GraphCast / GenCast repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/google-deepmind/graphcast>`__.
- Bi et al. *Pangu-Weather repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/198808xc/Pangu-Weather>`__.
- NVLabs. *FourCastNet repository*. `[link] <https://github.com/NVlabs/FourCastNet>`__.
